schemas.name: Trademark Registration
schemas.description: Trademark registration online. TM search, application filing, objection handling, registration certificate. Protect your brand across India. Virtual Auditor.

step.text: File TM-A application on IP India portal
step.name: Step 3

mainEntity.name: How long does trademark registration take?

acceptedAnswer.text: 12-18 months end-to-end. You can use ™ immediately after filing. ® only after Registration Certificate.
Brand names, logos, taglines, device marks, sound marks, colour combinations, shape of goods, and packaging. Must be distinctive (not descriptive of goods/services).
10 years from application date. Renewable indefinitely for successive 10-year periods.
Government fee: ₹4,500 (individual/startup) or ₹9,000 (others) per class. Our professional fee starts at ₹3,500. Total from ₹7,999.

mainEntity.name: What is the process for trademark registration?

acceptedAnswer.text: Search → File TM-A with IP India → Examination by Registrar → Objection (if any, reply within 30 days) → Publication in Trademark Journal → Opposition period (4 months) → Registration Certificate. Total: 12-18 months.

mainEntity.name: What is the government fee for trademark?

acceptedAnswer.text: ₹4,500 per class for individual/startup/small enterprise. ₹9,000 per class for others. Each class covers specific goods/services. Multiple classes: separate fee for each. Our professional fee: ₹3,000-₹5,000 per class.

Yes. ™ indicates you claim the mark but have no registration. You can use it immediately after filing. ® can only be used after Registration Certificate is issued. Using ® without registration is a criminal offence under Section 107.

mainEntity.name: What is the Nice Classification system?

acceptedAnswer.text: 45 classes of goods and services. Classes 1-34: goods. Classes 35-45: services. You must file in every class where you use or intend to use the mark. Class 35 (advertising) and Class 42 (IT services) are most common for service businesses.

mainEntity.name: How long is trademark protection valid?

acceptedAnswer.text: 10 years from date of application. Renewable every 10 years indefinitely. If not renewed: mark removed from register. Grace period: 6 months after expiry with surcharge. Restoration: within 1 year of removal.
